title: potentilla polyodonta
intro: Potentilla polyodonta, also known as Five-Leaf Goosefoot or Chinese Patrinia, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Potentilla polyodonta include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Potentilla polyodonta include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's roots, leaves, or flowers in hot water or a solvent.
